title: Duplicate keys
doc_html:
§1375. Duplicate keys

            Any duplicate or extra keys to the machines shall be sealed in an envelope by the parish custodian and the secretary of state and placed in a safe place. The seal shall not be broken or the keys used in any manner except with the consent of the parish custodian or the secretary of state.

            Acts 1976, No. 697, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1978; Acts 2001, No. 451, §6, eff. Jan. 12, 2004; Acts 2019, No. 374, §1, eff. June 19, 2019.
doc_text:
§1375.  Duplicate keys
Any duplicate or extra keys to the machines shall be sealed in an envelope by the
parish custodian and the secretary of state and placed in a safe place.  The seal shall not be
broken or the keys used in any manner except with the consent of the parish custodian or the
secretary of state.
Acts 1976, No. 697, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1978; Acts 2001, No. 451, §6, eff. Jan. 12, 2004;
Acts 2019, No. 374, §1, eff. June 19, 2019.
